articles.author: Jonathan J. Cooper, Konstantin Toropin, Farnoush Amiri
articles.title: Risky rescue of US crew downed in Iran relied on dozens of aircraft and subterfuge, Trump says - apnews.com
articles.description: The United States relied on dozens of aircraft, hundreds of personnel, secret CIA technology and a dose of subterfuge to rescue a two-man F-15E fighter jet crew downed deep inside Iran. President Donald Trump and his top defense aides detailed the daring resc…
